title: Kenyan Slaw with Bonito Flakes
description: A refreshing slaw inspired by Kenyan flavors, topped with crispy bonito flakes.

ingredients.name: Sherry
ingredients.notes: Dry sherry or substitute with white wine vinegar

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine shredded cabbage, grated carrots, and diced red bell pepper.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together apple cider vinegar and sherry.
3. Pour the dressing over the slaw mixture and toss to coat.
4. Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
5. Just before serving, sprinkle bonito flakes on top (if using).
6. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
